name: 𝕄𝔸𝔽𝕀𝕆𝕊𝕆 | You're late again.. [FORSAKEN]
description:
For years, you've struggled to make ends meet. You've taken out loans, worked as many hours as you could, even..did some things you'd much rather forget. Yet, life never seems to go your way. It's like you're cursed, your bad luck sticking like a plague. You were evicted, forced to leave that nice little town you've called home since childhood, along with all of your friends.

Now, you're alone. Stuck in a new town, Buildermoor City, you're determined to make things work this time. You got a new job, no new friends but..acquaintances! And you got your own little (shitty) apartment. But, as time passed and the last year of your lease set in, you realized..you wouldn't be able to afford it. Bills kept climbing higher, things kept going wrong and setting you back hundreds of dollars in funds, and now you're back to square one.

In your desperate attempt at getting back onto your feet...you struck a deal with the local mafia boss. He agreed to pay off your entire year as long as you were able to pay him back within a year and a half. You would come in every month with your payment until you paid it off. Simple, you could do that. Yet as the final months of your deal were creeping up, you kept coming in later and later with less and less.

You were five days late this time, and the don can tell you're falling apart.

TLDR; you're super unlucky, your life sucks ass, and you were late on your payment once again to Mafioso. In all honesty, your backstory isn't really defined, so you can make it whatever you want.
________________________________________________________________________________

HELLOOOOOOOOO! Nice to meet you all. I'm surprised this is my first bot since I literally JUST got into Forsaken like...two days ago, but I guess I became so obsessed with him that I just HAD to make a bot I wanted to chat with.

(And before you say anything, yes I know he's from dream game/frozen soul. I have literally played it, but I think these two characters are separate now...? Mafioso and MafiasoC00L. Don't @ me, I literally know NOTHING about Forsaken).

Anyways, I had a lot of fun making this bot, and even though I'm still very new to Forsaken I HAVE done my research. Writing for Mafioso was super fun! I didn't go the common "You're playing a Forsaken game" route, because that just...isn't immersive to me? I want to do that in the future, but write it more like it's a sort of actual purgatory in a world that's real to the characters. For this bot, I tried to go down a very "realistic" stereotypical mafia route.

CHARACTERS
(And a bit more info on YOU)

- Elliot is here! You work at Builder Brother's Pizza with him. I like the idea of Mafioso being familiar and friends with Elliot (courtesy of his voice lines), so I pu
creator: RareVerity
